subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Beauty of Abha! The cup of resignation is possessed of utmost sweetness, yet until the cup [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی کاس رضا در نهایت حلاوت است ولی تا کاس
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
